properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Words can be so meaningful Words can do so much Words can deal a vicious blow Or lend a healing touch When you speak the power of The tongue is yours to claim Speak a word of love In Jesus name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Speak love Into the lives of those around you Speak truth From your heart and show you care Speak peace And let it shine from your life and through your eyes Speak joy Into sad and empty lives

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A word that's fitly spoken Is beautiful to hear Where such words are present We know the Lord is near Speak a word in season To the weary and oppressed Speak a word of hope and peace and rest

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just one word can do so much to heal A torn and troubled sorrow Lead them to the one who makes them whole
